since_last: 79% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.21%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 79% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.85% · BTC +1.23% · Gold +1.80% · Nasdaq100 +1.77%. 79% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.21%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.21%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.59%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +11.04%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +11.04%, HPE +8.05%, MU +7.95%, SYNA +7.81%, LSCC +7.04%. Laggards: AVAV -4.58%, PLTR -3.21%, IBM -2.86%, CRM -2.24%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.93% at $152.65
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.93% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
